title: Discover Essence of Vietnam from North to South by Luxury Train 8 days
route: Hanoi - Ninh Binh - Quang Binh - Hue - Hoi An - Phan Thiet - Ho Chi Minh City
accommodation: Overnight on Luxury Train (7 nights)
includedActivities: Accommodation: 7 nights onboard in a double or twin cabin with en-suite bathroom, daily servicing, air conditioning, safety box, linens, and amenities.
Dining: Breakfast, lunch, and dinner prepared onboard with premium local ingredients, plus authentic dining experiences at local restaurants during excursions.
Beverages: Daily complimentary soft drinks, beer, and house wine by the glass (per drinks list). Tea and coffee available onboard. One complimentary beverage served with meals off the train.
Service: Dedicated cabin attendant service, evening turndown, experienced Tour Management team, and private airport/hotel transfers in Hanoi or Ho Chi Minh City.
Excursions: Guided tours with English-speaking local guides, including entrance fees as per itinerary.
